name: I didn't go to the doctor right after my delivery accident—is it too late?

mainEntity.name: I didn't go to the doctor right after my delivery accident—is it too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: It's not too late, but every day you wait strengthens the insurance company's defense. Seek medical attention immediately and specify the work-related cause of your injury to create a formal paper trail.
